title: Fuel atomizer cone
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Fuel atomizer cones''' were pieces of equipment on board [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class space cruisers]]. They presumably served to help feed fuel into the [[Starship/Legends|starship's]] engines.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2013-07-29 -->[[Star Wars: Complete Vehicles (2013)|''Star Wars: Complete Vehicles'']]
